title: Apple’s New Siri AI Is Now Gemini
summary: Apple revealed a rebuilt Siri AI at WWDC 2026 with personal context, screen awareness, Visual Intelligence, writing tools, and cross-device conversations integrated across iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch, and Vision Pro. The new Siri reportedly leverages Google Gemini technology but will not launch in the EU at release, and Apple shares fell after the announcement.
writeup: The video covers Apple's WWDC 2026 reveal of a rebuilt Siri that adds personal context, screen awareness, Visual Intelligence, writing tools, and cross-device conversations spanning iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch, and Vision Pro. It matters because Siri reportedly now runs on Google Gemini technology, marking a shift in how Apple Intelligence is powered. Key takeaways: the new Siri will not launch in the EU at release, and Apple shares fell after the announcement.
